title: Range
description: This is the official copy of the Fatal SIege mini game plugin from the Vorg Craft server.
body:
| This plugin cannot be used for commercial purposes unless the Vorg Craft server is mentioned as the author of the project. |

Fatal Siege - a game where towers are lined up in a circle (or other geometric figure), and which are attacked by zombies, the game also has an in-game store and various kits (before the game - the player chooses 2 kits. Permissions:
⚫ FatalSiege.premiumkit.1 - Ninja Kit
⚫ FatalSiege.premiumkit.2 - Alchemist Kit
⚫ FatalSiege.premiumkit.3 - Engineer Kit
⚫ FatalSiege.premiumkit.ADMIN - Administration permission
Commands:
⚫ /fatal join - Join the game
⚫ /fatal addPoints - Add yourself game points
⚫ /fatal Create - Create the arena
⚫ /fatal addLoc - Add the location of the player and the place where zombies fall, removing his health.
⚫ /fatal set1/set2 - Add field boundaries (no towers)
⚫ /fatal setLobby - Define a waiting area for the game.
⚫ /fatal setServerLobby - Define a server lobby.
⚫ /fatal setMob - Define a mob spawning location for the arena.
⚫ /fatal COMPLETE - Finish editing the plugin.



Play on Vorg Craft - play.vvvorg.com
